channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: The Next Space Race: Could the U.S. Tech Boom Send SPCX Past $3 Trillion by 2027?
item.description: SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) is surging back again after a brief fall from its highs. SPCX stock is up by almost 11 days in the past five trading sessions and is likely set to continue moving higher in the coming days as the broader rally shows no sign of stopping. In fact, many analysts (retail and the ...

item.title: Elon Musk Shares Wish For Mankind On 55th Birthday, Mom Maye Says Son Celebrated With Rocket And Moon Base Cake
item.description: Elon Musk, best known as the CEO of Tesla Inc. and SpaceX, celebrated his 55th birthday Sunday with public wishes from family members, investors, political figures and entertainers who framed him as a son, entrepreneur and free-speech champion. Family Tributes...

item.title: Tesla sends production Cybercab with no steering wheel, pedals to on-road testing
item.description: Tesla confirmed this morning that it has sent the first production units, manufactured with no steering wheel or pedals, to on-road testing in Austin, sharing video of the first rides with no human controls. The lack of steering wheels and pedals in the Cybercab aligns with Tesla’s self-certifica...

item.title: Is Tesla Stock A Bet On Cars Or A Cash-Burning Bet on AI?
item.description: The company is spending billions to pivot from electric vehicles to robotics and autonomy, forcing investors to decide if the long-term vision is worth the near-term cost.

item.title: Tesla Q2 delivery preview: Europe, international sales the driver as US sales in decline
item.description: Tesla will report second quarter delivery numbers as early as tomorrow as the EV maker seeks another quarter of recovering sales.

item.title: Autonomous driving firm Autobrains eyes robotaxi growth in Europe, CEO says
item.description: Europe is an emerging but promising market for self-driving 'robotaxis', with the technology ‌set to become far more visible across the ‌region over the next two years, the CEO of Israeli autonomous driving ​firm Autobrains said on Tuesday. "I think 2026 and 2027 is going to be an inflection poin...

item.title: Tech Weekly: Tesla's FSD tech up for debate, Shell unveils concept car
item.description: STORY: From Tesla's self-driving challenges in Europe... to South Korea's chip and AI mega-projects... This is Tech Weekly.

item.title: Tesla begins ‘engineering tests’ of first production Cybercab in Austin
item.description: Tesla says it has started engineering tests of its first production Cybercab on public roads in Austin, marking the first time a customer-spec unit of the purpose-built robotaxi has been validated outside the factory. But a video shared by the company shows the two-seater driving with a superviso...

item.title: Tesla Q2 Deliveries Due Later This Week. Stock Gains On Newest FSD Update.
item.description: Tesla will report second-quarter deliveries later this week, even as Wall Street becomes increasingly focused on FSD and robotaxis.

item.title: Prediction: This Is Where Tesla’s Price Target Points In 2027
item.description: Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is $416.37, modestly above where the stock trades today. With shares at $411.84, the implied move is roughly 1.1% over the next 12 months.

item.title: Tesla: This Could Be The Biggest Disconnect In Market History
Tesla and SpaceX Are Joined at the Hip. That Makes a Strange Kind of Sense.
item.description: SpaceX stock and Tesla shares are doing something surprising: They are rising and falling together. Shares of Elon Musk’s rocket and AI company were down 0.2% in early trading at $163.92, while the and were up 0.1% and flat, respectively. SpaceX stock gained 7.2%, its best day since June 15,...

item.title: Tesla Stock Falls After Big Gains as Auto Industry Wrestles With Copper Prices
item.description: Tesla stock was a little lower early Tuesday after an epic Monday, as the car industry looks for solutions to rising commodity prices. Tesla stock gained 8.5% on Monday, rising roughly $30 a share, more than wiping out $20-per-share losses of the prior week. Tuesday’s early move came as Reuters ...

item.title: TSLA Stock Rises Ahead of Q2 Deliveries Report: Buy, Hold, or Sell?
item.description: Tesla rises ahead of Q2 deliveries, with stronger overseas demand and energy growth balanced by delayed timelines and higher capex concerns.

item.title: An App Flagged This Tesla Battery As Degraded. The Car Said It Was Worse
item.description: A four-year-old Model 3 Performance scored 88% battery health in Tesla's own test—lower than its owner expected, but close to a prediction by a third-party app.

item.title: Tesla Faces New Autonomy Challenger
item.description: Uber, Stellantis and Nissan partnerships add momentum.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Just Went Parabolic
item.description: Tesla Stock Soars as Wall Street Bets on a Massive Q2 Delivery Beat

item.title: Does Elon Musk's Recent $1 Trillion SpaceX Comment Heavily Hint That a Tesla Merger Is Coming?
item.description: Elon Musk may have recently given a big hint about what's on the horizon for SpaceX and Tesla.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Delivery Outlook Improves as Morgan Stanley Keeps Equal Weight Rating
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 14 AI Stocks Making Moves on Wall Street: Nvidia, Micron, and More. On June 26, Morgan Stanley reiterated the stock as equal weight, stating how it anticipates robust delivery numbers from Tesla the following week.

item.title: Tesla's Robotaxi Math Doesn't Work With Human Safety Drivers, Gary Black Says
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC thinks that Tesla Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:TSLA) Robotaxis with a human safety driver on board cost more than rivals like Alphabet Inc.-backed (NASDAQ:GOOGL) (NASDAQ:GOOG) Waymo, as well as Baidu Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:BIDU) Apollo Go Robotaxi and Amazon.com Inc.‘s (NASDA...

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500, Dow Futures Hold Steady Ahead Of JOLTS Report, Nike Earnings: Why SLS, TSLA, SPCX, SNDK, AVAV, JACK Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment around SPY was ‘bearish’, while QQQ sentiment remained ‘bullish.’

item.title: Tesla Stock Surges 8% After FSD v14 Lite Update Launches
item.description: Tesla stock jumped more than 8% after rolling out its FSD v14 Lite software to millions of older vehicles for the first time in over a year.

item.title: TSLA Stock Trims Losses Overnight: Tesla Cybercab Starts Austin Tests Without ‘Steering Wheel Or Pedals’
item.description: Tesla also detailed safety features including at least 10 airbags, active hood protection, and emergency releases.

item.title: @Tesla on X - Engineering tests of the first production Cybercab have begun in Austin
item.description: submitted by /u/Latter-Astronaut5755 [link] [comments]

item.title: TSLA Q2 Deliveries May Miss Estimates, But Cantor Says AI, Robotics, Chips Could Drive 'Transformational' 2026
item.description: The firm expects 397,414 Q2 deliveries, below Tesla’s company-compiled consensus of 408,609.

item.title: Prediction: Tesla Stock Could Go Parabolic After July 2
item.description: It will be a volatile ride for investors one way or another.

item.title: Innoviz Technologies Backs Mobileye (MBLY) Robotaxi Push With LiDAR Supply Deal
item.description: Given its significant hedge fund backing and attractive upside potential, Mobileye Global Inc. (NASDAQ:MBLY) is one of the most promising robotics stocks. Mobileye Global Inc.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Rallies On U.S.-Iran News; Alphabet, Rocket Lab, SpaceX, Tesla Are Big Winners
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: The stock market rallied Monday on U.S.-Iran news. Alphabet, Rocket Lab, SpaceX stock and Tesla surged.

item.title: These 2 Industrial Giants Have Crushed Tesla's Returns Over the Last 12 Months. Will The Party Continue?
item.description: Tesla's stock has gone up 14% over the past year, which is pretty good, but it still pales in comparison to Cat and GE Vernova.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Teams With Sunrun And Renew Home On A 16 Gigawatt Virtual Power Plant
item.description: Tesla, Sunrun, and Renew Home have agreed to combine residential batteries, rooftop solar, and smart devices into a nationwide virtual power plant. The alliance targets more than 16 gigawatts of flexible capacity for utilities and large data and AI operators across the U.S. The partnership aims t...

item.title: Tesla Phone? Not quite, but close: analyst
item.description: For years, there have been images and videos across social media platforms that have reminded me of when I was a 15-year-old kid teased by “Xbox 720” videos on YouTube. These videos are of the supposed “Tesla Phone” that Elon Musk was secretly developing in between leading Tesla with its electric...

item.title: Tesla Leads Magnificent Seven Recovery, Analysts Chime In On Deliveries
item.description: Tesla stock rose over 8% on Monday, after a poor showing the week prior, leading the Magnificent Seven. Elon Musk's automaker will report second-quarter deliveries this week.

item.title: Tesla Q2 deliveries: What to expect from the critical report
item.description: Investing.com — Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is preparing for a crucial Q2 delivery report expected around July 2, a data point that could be the company’s most consequential in two years. To provide clarity on the gap between expectations, market participants are tracking two distinct consensus figures:...

item.title: What's Behind Tesla's Rally Today?
item.description: Morgan Stanley and Barclays raised Q2 delivery estimates above 413,000 units while the NHTSA dropped the steering probe.

item.title: New Tesla ‘Full Self-Driving’ class action hilariously cites Electrek
item.description: A new proposed class action accuses Tesla of selling “Full Self-Driving” on millions of vehicles that are physically incapable of delivering it — and to make its case, the 51-page complaint repeatedly cites Electrek’s own reporting. The suit, Waller v. Tesla (No.

item.title: A Potential SpaceX Mobile Deal Makes Charter One of Today’s Top S&P 500 Stocks
item.description: Charter Communications stock is near the top of the S&P 500. SpaceX and Comcast are part of the move with possible changes coming to U.S. Internet providers.

item.title: Tesla’s 10% Weight in ARKK Sets Up a Make-or-Break Year for the Innovation ETF
item.description: The ARK Innovation ETF (NYSEARCA:ARKK) has barely moved this year, gaining about 2% year to date through late June and sitting at roughly $78 per share. That stasis hides a violent tug of war inside the portfolio: AMD has more than doubled, up 144% YTD, while Coinbase has shed 34% and Tesla (NASD...

item.title: Tesla Jumps 8%, Rivian and Lucid Rise 7% as EV Stocks Ride a Tech Rebound
item.description: Electric vehicle stocks are surging in midday trading on Monday as a broad tech rebound lifts high-beta names across the market. Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is up 8% to $409.29, leading the group with a company-specific catalyst layered on top of the sector bounce. Rivian (NASDAQ:RIVN) stock is cli...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Is Exploring a New Global Partnership And It Goes Beyond EVs
item.description: With short percentage of shares outstanding at 2.05%, Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is among the 7 Best EV Charging Infrastructure Stocks to Buy Now. On June 16, Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Tesla Faces Fierce New Rival in Self-Driving Race
item.description: It has been assumed up until recently that the primary challenge to Tesla’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) self-driving business was Google Waymo. Other technologies from smaller companies exist. And major legacy car companies like GM (NYSE: GM) are developing their own products.

item.title: Why Charter Communications Is Today’s Top S&P 500 Stock
item.description: Charter Communications stock is at the top of the S&P 500. SpaceX and Comcast are part of the move with possible changes coming to U.S. Internet providers.

item.title: Comcast, Charter, Rocket Lab, SpaceX, Tesla, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: Stocks rose on Monday with tech shares mostly bouncing back and the set to snap its five-day losing streak. In addition, the Supreme Court on Monday rejected President Donald Trump’s attempt to remove Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook. Comcast stock gained 7%, paring back gains from a premarke...

item.title: Tesla reveals huge Cybercab detail in new guide for First Responders
item.description: Tesla revealed a major new Cybercab detail in a guide it released for First Responders, showing new territory in its beliefs and intentions for the ride-hailing-focused vehicle that entered production in April. The First Responders Guide is released to give fire departments, paramedics, and other...

item.title: Invesco’s SPHD Pays 4.57% While the S&P 500 Pays 0.98%, And It Is Up This Year Without the Tech Bubble Risk
item.description: Due to the attention given to their trillion dollar market caps and preoccupation with A.I., the Magnificent 7 stocks (Apple, Amazon, Alphabet/Google, Meta Platforms/Facebook, Nvidia, Microsoft, and Tesla) often make people forget that there are 493 other stocks in the S&P 500 worth investors’ co...

item.title: Tesla Recovers Alongside Magnificent Seven, Analysts Chime In On Deliveries
item.description: Tesla stock rose more than 3% on Monday, after a poor showing the week prior. Elon Musk's automaker will report second-quarter deliveries this week.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ Release Notes: new capabilities and features
item.description: Tesla released the Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ suite to owners of Hardware 3 or AI3 vehicles today, adding several new features to the vehicles that were once believed to be capable of unsupervised self-driving. Now, Tesla has released this modified suite to older Tesla vehicles , adding plenty ...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ for older cars finally gets released
item.description: Tesla has finally released its Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ suite for older cars that equip the Hardware 3 or AI 3 chip, which have not been able to handle the newest versions of the company’s driver assistance software. Tesla officially started releasing the v14 Lite suite to owners in the Early...

item.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
item.description: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

item.title: Wall Street Is Divided On Tesla, but I Keep Buying The Stock
item.description: I bought Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) again last Friday, and I will probably buy it again next month. The bears on Reddit and the seven analysts carrying Sell or Strong Sell ratings have not talked me out of it, and neither has a year-to-date drawdown of -15.57%. I keep coming back to the buy button becau...

item.title: Tesla starts FSD v14 ‘Lite’ rollout to HW3 cars
item.description: Tesla has started rolling out FSD v14 “Lite” to its Hardware 3 (HW3) cars, the company’s AI chief Ashok Elluswamy confirmed today. The build, firmware version 2026.20.5.1, is going out first to early-access drivers. It’s the first major Full Self-Driving update for the roughly 4 million HW3 vehic...
